programme.desc: At long last, Popatlal opens up about his worries to Champaklal and to the Almighty. Meanwhile, Jethalal is in for a surprise.

programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham are saddened to learn that Popatlal will not be getting paid any time soon. Though they offer to help him out, Popatlal refuses to accept it.
